name: Shudan
when_to_use: 需要把围棋落子矩阵渲成带坐标、标记、箭头或热力覆盖的高质量棋盘时用它,而非手写 canvas/SVG——原生在十九路网格对齐、棋子质感与多层覆盖上失败。非围棋规则引擎或 SGF 解析器。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到稳定的十九路棋盘几何、棋子纹理、标记/热力/连线叠层与缩放;Shudan 直接消费二维落子矩阵,把 Sabaki 级 Goban 渲染交给经过验证的 Preact 组件。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing canvas/SVG when you need to render a Go stone matrix as a high-quality board with coordinates, markers, arrows, or heat overlays, because native implementations fail at 19x19 grid alignment, stone appearance, and multi-layer overlays. Not a Go rules engine or SGF parser.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot normally deliver stable 19x19 board geometry, stone textures, marker/heat/line overlays, and scaling; Shudan directly consumes a two-dimensional stone matrix and delegates Sabaki-grade Goban rendering to a verified Preact component.

data_in.note: signMap is the native upstream map: the outer dimension is rows (y), the inner dimension is columns (x), and every row has equal length. All vertex coordinates are zero-based [x,y]. This component does not handle rules, captures, or legality.

schema.signMap: (0 | 1 | -1)[][] -- 1=black stone, -1=white stone, 0=empty intersection; default [] is an empty board
schema.markerMap?: ({type?:'circle'|'cross'|'triangle'|'square'|'point'|'loader'|'label'|null,label?:string|null,tooltip?:string|null}|null)[][] -- should match signMap dimensions; no markers by default
schema.heatMap?: ({strength:number,text?:string|null}|null)[][] -- strength is heat intensity; no heat layer by default
schema.animateStonePlacement?: boolean -- default false; takes effect only when fuzzyStonePlacement=true and a new signMap object is supplied

spec.note: BoundedGoban must receive explicit maxWidth/maxHeight; boot defaults both to 480px, and the board stays square. AI may use other positive integer pixel values; do not use vh or percentage heights.

data_in.note: signMap 是上游原生 Map:外层按行(y),内层按列(x),所有行等长；顶点坐标均为零基 [x,y]。规则、提子与合法性不由本组件处理。

schema.markerMap?: ({type?:'circle'|'cross'|'triangle'|'square'|'point'|'loader'|'label'|null,label?:string|null,tooltip?:string|null}|null)[][] —— 尺寸应与 signMap 相同,默认无标记
schema.heatMap?: ({strength:number,text?:string|null}|null)[][] —— strength 为热力强度,默认无热力层
schema.animateStonePlacement?: boolean —— 默认 false；仅在 fuzzyStonePlacement=true 且传入新的 signMap 对象时生效

spec.note: BoundedGoban 必须得到明确的 maxWidth/maxHeight；boot 默认二者均为 480px,棋盘保持正方形。AI 可改为其他正整数像素,禁用 vh/百分比高度。

peer.note: 本条只渲盘面；SGF 解析、轮次、提子与合法性须由消费 AI 另接围棋规则/棋谱引擎。顶点回调是上游普通回调,不在 catalog 中抽成统一事件契约。

example._why_no_minimal: 核心输入只是取值被钉死的等宽二维网格,裁剪 schema 足以一次拼对；按模板只保留空态 fixture。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:需 ESM CDN、Preact 与 document.head CSS；CSS 还读取同版本包内 board.png
carriers.widget: conditional:挂载点与 @import CSS 可封闭在 shadowRoot；仍需允许 jsDelivr 上的 Preact、组件、CSS 与 board.png
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + Preact + DOM/SVG；须加载同版本 Shudan CSS

isolation.evidence: @sabaki/shudan@1.8.0 +esm: the only document.* usage is createElement (Preact internal node creation); no document.head, no document.body, no window/document addEventListener. Preact render() mounts into the passed host; Marker.tooltip renders inline in the board; all interaction is via onVertex* component props (no global listeners). Component is side-effect-free but needs goban.css loaded via @import so its relative url('./board.png')/url('./stone_1.svg')/url('./stone_-1.svg') resolve against the CDN base, and that CSS routed into the same shadow root -> conditional.
